emails.body: Re: URGENT REQUEST As long as the coal lawyers have approved the contract forms it looks good to me. Nick Mooney 07/05/2000 11:54 AM

emails.subject: URGENT REQUEST
emails.body: URGENT REQUEST Mark, we have added some language to the basic customer letter for a mailshot to Coal clients. Very Short notice this need to go out immediatley UK time. Could you please give it a quick review to complete the loop. Dave Forster, Louise and all the UK guys have OK'd it. Cheers Nick
